---
mode: edit
description: Translate approved Chinese draft to English
---
Translate `content/{slug}/draft-cn.md` into English and write the result to `content/{slug}/draft-en.md`.

Translation rules:
- Do NOT translate word-for-word. Rewrite for a native English technical audience.
- Preserve all code blocks unchanged.
- Keep the same section structure and heading hierarchy.
- Adapt idioms and cultural references to resonate with a Western engineering audience.
- Target length: 1500–1800 words.
- Maintain the author's voice: direct, confident, occasionally witty.

After translation, review the English draft for:
- [ ] Clarity (no awkward phrasing)
- [ ] Consistency (terms used consistently throughout)
- [ ] Flow (each paragraph leads naturally to the next)
- [ ] Front matter complete (title, date, tags, description, image, lang: en)
